LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

ExactSplit.min:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0},0> @1 of
                   λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
                   λ<[_]>
                     case<Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0},0> @1 of
                       λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
                       λ<[_]> @4 @1 @0

ExactSplit.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: ExactSplit.min Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
            Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
